nasb.text: I will lay My vengeance on Edom by the hand of My people Israel. Therefore, they will act in Edom according to My anger and according to My wrath; thus they will know My vengeance,” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: And I will lay my vengeance upon Edom by the hand of my people Israel, and they shall do in Edom according to my anger and according to my wrath, and they shall know my vengeance, declares the Lord God.

cnv.text: 我必藉著我子民以色列的手報復以東；以色列人必照著我的怒氣，按著我的烈怒對待以東，以東人就知道這是我的報復。這是主耶和華的宣告。”

ccb.text: 我要借我以色列子民的手向以东报仇。以色列人会照我的烈怒惩罚他们。那时，他们就会尝到我报应他们的滋味，这是主耶和华说的。’
